name: Roasted Garlic Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the potatoes in half lengthwise, then slice medium.
2. Mince the garlic or put through a garlic press.
3. Melt butter in a small saucepan and add garlic. Cook on medium heat for 1 minute.
4. Add the minced garlic, half the cheese, salt, and pepper to the potatoes. Stir until the potatoes are well coated.
5. Pour the mixture into a greased shallow baking dish.
6. Top with the remaining cheese.
7. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit uncovered until golden brown, about 30 minutes. Do not stir or turn during cooking.
